productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Black Twenty2yds Sports Shoes
description: Style Note With these adidas Twenty2 Yards shoes, aggression, dominance and performance will come naturally to you. Whether it's capoeira, soccer or karate, these adidas shoes give you a natural feel for fast sweeps and swift strikes.The ClimaCool technology ensures that your feet stay cool on a hot and humid day. Product Details White with red and black trim running shoes, synthetic upper with perforations for breathability, Adidas 3-Stripe overlay at the toebox, soft footbed, reinforced overlay at the heel collar, central lace-ups, foam padded tongue with branding, rubber outsole with patterned grooves for grip, plastic mid foot arch with perforations for breathability Material and Care Synthetic, rubber outsole, plastic Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
